Class clsFavouriteMovie

java.lang.Object
org.example.clsFavouriteMovie
public class clsFavouriteMovie extends Object
Represents a user's favorite movie relationship in the system. This class manages the association between users and their favorite movies, allowing the system to track which movies each user has marked as favorites.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    clsFavouriteMovie()
    Default constructor that creates an empty FavouriteMovie object.
    clsFavouriteMovie(int favouriteID, int userID, int movieID)
    Parameterized constructor that creates a FavouriteMovie object with specified values.

  • Constructor Details

    • clsFavouriteMovie

      public clsFavouriteMovie()
      Default constructor that creates an empty FavouriteMovie object. All integer fields are initialized to 0.

    • clsFavouriteMovie

      public clsFavouriteMovie(int favouriteID, int userID, int movieID)
      Parameterized constructor that creates a FavouriteMovie object with specified values.
      Parameters:
      favouriteID - the unique identifier for this favorite movie entry
      userID - the identifier of the user
      movieID - the identifier of the favorite movie

  • Method Details

    • getFavouriteID

      public int getFavouriteID()
      Gets the favorite ID.
      Returns:
      the unique identifier for this favorite movie entry

    • setFavouriteID

      public void setFavouriteID(int favouriteID)
      Sets the favorite ID.
      Parameters:
      favouriteID - the unique identifier to set for this favorite movie entry

    • getUserID

      public int getUserID()
      Gets the user ID.
      Returns:
      the identifier of the user who marked this movie as favorite

    • setUserID

      public void setUserID(int userID)
      Sets the user ID.
      Parameters:
      userID - the identifier of the user to set

    • getMovieID

      public int getMovieID()
      Gets the movie ID.
      Returns:
      the identifier of the favorite movie

    • setMovieID

      public void setMovieID(int movieID)
      Sets the movie ID.
      Parameters:
      movieID - the identifier of the movie to set

    • favouriteMovieDetails

      public String favouriteMovieDetails()
      Retrieves a formatted string containing all favorite movie details.
      Returns:
      a string representation of the favorite movie entry including favorite ID, user ID, and movie ID
